sourceMovie.title: What Men Want
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: What Men Want works as a comedy movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The comedy and romance blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Silver Linings Playbook
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If What Men Want clicked for you, Silver Linings Playbook (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in comedy and romance, with comic timing and sharper banter. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after What Men Want?
faq.answer: Try Silver Linings Playbook, Amélie, Focus—each shares DNA with What Men Want while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is What Men Want?
faq.answer: What Men Want (2019) is best described as Comedy, Romance. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is What Men Want worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.2/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this comedy lane.
